description.ko: 검은 흑요석 구체가 수천 개의 날카로운 다각형 파편으로 파괴되는 고속 시각화를 통해 디지털 카오스의 미학을 표현합니다.
description.en: A high-velocity visualization of a black obsidian sphere fracturing into thousands of sharp polygonal fragments, representing the beauty of digital chaos.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian sphere by KURO-X, titled 'The Geometric Singularity.' The structure is undergoing a high-velocity mathematical deconstruction, shattering into a vortex of sharp #808080 and #C0C0C0 polygonal shards against a clinical #FFFFFF digital vacuum. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel-sorting textures, and intense chromatic aberration cut through the composition. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on shifting planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing precise mathematical chaos.
